column1: # atlas_alert_history.tsv — alert firing event log (ω-bridge-21 stub)
# format (TAB-separated, append-only / raw 77):
#   ts<TAB>rule<TAB>ratio<TAB>threshold<TAB>last_n<TAB>sampled<TAB>extra
# fields:
#   ts          ISO-8601 UTC of when the alert fired (system clock at emit time,
#               NOT the ts of the row that triggered the rule)
#   rule        warn_ratio | insufficient_ratio | consecutive_warn | recent_warn_ratio
#   ratio       observed ratio (dot-decimal, 4 sig figs); "0.0000" for streak rules
#   threshold   configured threshold (dot-decimal); "0" for consecutive_warn (streak rule)
#   last_n      configured window size (int); "0" for recent_warn_ratio (uses window_minutes)
#   sampled     actual rows sampled at evaluation time
#   extra       rule-specific:
#                 consecutive_warn  → "streak=K"
#                 recent_warn_ratio → "window_minutes=M"
#                 warn_ratio        → ""
#                 insufficient_ratio→ ""
# emitter:    tool/atlas_alert_subscriber.hexa (FIRED outcomes only — PASS/SKIP not recorded)
# consumed by: future trend-analysis tooling (alert rate over time, MTBA per rule, etc.)
# This stub seeds the canonical path. Operators may pre-populate or
# override location via env ATLAS_ALERT_HISTORY_TSV=/path/to/foo.tsv.
